text.message: Don't know what to do in this situation
Could have ploughed you on 4 11 blue
Yeah but didn't want a lifelong enemy
Why did you plow the wheat port then?
Because that was my only play left
I was 4th and all the good wheat was gone already
You were kinda greedy when you went for that spot as well
nice to see whos spiteful for no reason
im already getting robbed in last
Sorry bro but I accepted last time even after being blocked
Well kinda was because you expect nb to last that turn atleat
You can have my next sheep
Red is going to be cooking, with the city and 83, so target evenly atleast
btw i only took army to keep it from black
I think red is the most dangerous but he had no cards
i cant do it 1 for 1 when im behind
i need devs if im gonna fight for army
useless to get one and not the other
